title: El prisionero 13
actors: Alfredo del Diestro, Luis G. Barreiro, Adela Sequeyro
plot: El Prisionero 13 (Prisoner 13) is part of the trilogy of films made by Fernando Fuentes concerning the Mexican Revolution. The film centers on the drunkard Colonel Carrasco, whose wife Marta leaves him taking his young son. The ch...
